title: Narayana Health is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Health is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
